blocks.text: We all learned something from each other. Johannes, you taught us to accept ourselves as we are. To trust life and accept destiny means to become free in life and in death. Not everyone needs it, but for some of us it was essential. Without your peaceful voice and calm speeches some of us would have gone mad. Of course, most tokens simply fell asleep under your murmur, but sleep is also important in our troubled times. We believe that you have found peace. Sleep tight, brother.

Oh, Rick. How tired we were of your anarchic crap. You should be happy now, because you died when there was nothing left in the world except for anarchy. But are you satisfied with this world? A world in which there are no skyscrapers, stock exchanges, brothels, sports cars, yachts, corrupt politicians, and now no anarchists? If we had to choose between all this and you, it's hard to say what we would decide to get back. Of course, it's a shame that you died, but we are used to death. Congratulations, you eternal rebel, Rick. You won this game.

Bright, cheerful, talented, responsible, but picky. We will remember her like that. Laila's biography is the story of a good girl who always tried to be fair and protect the weak. During her life she had seen a lot, but she did not have a mendacious bone in her body, and she was very open, supportive and harmonious. Laila's life was cut off too early and too tragically, so it is not easy for us to reconcile with this. We will remember you forever, girl.

You were not a very talkative guy. We went through a lot together, but we did not really have the chance to get to know you better. However, we knew for sure that you could be relied on. Without demanding much in return you were always there to help, and then you quietly stepped aside when your help was not needed anymore. We saw what you were like when you were angry, how dangerous you became, so we tried to avoid you. Perhaps you lacked friendship, and you were very lonely. It's all our fault. We will miss you, mysterious Lee.

How can this be true... Why you? There's so much scum around me, and I myself am such a bastard. It would have been better if we had all died and you stayed alive. My beloved Ruby, I never told you the most important words. I was afraid to look weak and odd. Damn me, what kind of fool am I? Everything has lost its meaning. I cannot stand it. Seeing all these freaks alive, when you are buried under the rocks in that cave, covered in blood, just like a piece of meat. It's scary to think about it, but I cannot stop. The last thing you saw was darkness. Darkness is the most terrible thing to see before death. My poor Ruby. I love you, my sweet thief. Your Filthy King, left without his Queen.
